_description: Sentinel coverage baseline. Forward-only ratchet enforced by validate_sentinel_baseline.py. Delete this file to re-baseline after an approved coverage drop.
_relock_reason: Approved coverage drop 2026-05-19: behavioral_coverage_pct 100.0 -> 94.4 because the L-1.5 session added 3 new Layer 0 validators (validate_loads_utils_js, validate_validator_cp1252_guard, validate_canonical_overlap) WITHOUT corresponding Playwright behavioral specs. These validators are real additions, not bugs to remove. Future session must backfill one Playwright spec per validator using the `test('check_name: ...', ...)` auto-match convention to recover 100%.
